sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_struct (data STRUCT<i: INTEGER, v2: INTEGER, v3: INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_struct VALUES (CAST({'i': 5, 'v2': 10, 'v3': 15} AS STRUCT<i: INTEGER, v2: INTEGER, v3: INTEGER>));
INSERT INTO test_struct VALUES (CAST({'i': 3, 'v2': 6, 'v3': 12} AS STRUCT<i: INTEGER, v2: INTEGER, v3: INTEGER>));
SELECT struct_extract(data, 'i') AS extracted_i FROM test_struct;
UPDATE test_struct SET data = CAST(struct_extract(data, 'v2') + 2 AS STRUCT<i: INTEGER, v2: INTEGER, v3: INTEGER>) WHERE struct_extract(data, 'i') = 5;
